title: Context Architecture Case Study: 500-Person Enterprise AI Migration
full_text: When TechGlobal's CTO announced they were migrating 500+ developers to AI-assisted development, the engineering organization panicked. Previous AI pilot programs had failed spectacularly. Developers complained about inconsistent AI output, security teams worried about code leaks, and project manager
